nasb.text: I will also turn My face from them, and they will profane My secret place; then robbers will enter and profane it.

esv.text: I will turn my face from them, and they shall profane my treasured place. Robbers shall enter and profane it.

cnv.text: 我必轉臉不看他們，讓他們褻瀆我的聖所。 強盜要進那裡去，褻瀆那地方。

ccb.text: 我必转脸不看他们，任由外族人亵渎我的殿，强盗必进入殿里大肆亵渎。
